2000October 12, 2000

🇺🇸 Charleston, SC, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Charleston, United States, October 12, 2000 -- October 20, 2000

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2000-10-charleston-sc-usa

10 Resolutions

480Plenary
Cancel inactive Abstract Test Suite Parts of ISO 10303
SC 4 cancels the following inactive Abstract Test Suite Parts of ISO 10303, and instructs its Secretariat to remove them from the work programme, in the absence of any firm development commitment b...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
479Plenary
Create team for UML-EXPRESS cooperation and harmonization
SC 4 resolves that WG 11 create a team of people lead by Bernd Wenzel and including, but not limited to, the following individuals: * Dave Price * Phil Spiby
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
478Plenary
Request new ISO number for EXPRESS Edition 3
SC 4 requests ISO Central Secretariat to provide a new standard number for SC 4 project #32952.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
477Plenary
Create task force on Integrated Manufacturing for mechanical components
SC 4 creates a task force on Integrated Manufacturing for mechanical components, with the following objectives: * Define the scope of Integrated Manufacturing * Create an Integrated AAM covering th...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
476Plenary
Endorse Martin Hardwick as Chair of Industrial Data Implementor's Forum
SC 4 endorses the nomination of Martin Hardwick as Chair of the Industrial Data Implementor's Forum to serve for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
475Plenary
Allow photographs in SC 4 normative documents
SC 4 resolves that photographs may be included in SC 4 normative documents when such photographs will enhance the understandability and use of those documents, in accordance with ISO directives.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to its meeting host, US PRO, for the excellent meeting facilities, good food, as well as the wonderful Social Event on Tuesday evening. SC 4 also expresses its appre...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Sophie Clivio for taking time from her busy schedule to participate in our meeting and for her valuable guidance and support for SC 4 work.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Larry McKee for many years of outstanding leadership, and his many contributions to the development of SC 4 standards. Larry will be remembered for his patience a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to those who participated for their outstanding contributions and professionalism this week to the work of ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
